title: New Wayukian Appleskin Compatibility
description: An Appleskin resource pack for compatibility with the New Wayukian texture pack.
body:
A resource pack that makes Appleskin compatible with the [New Wayukian texture pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/new-wayukian/) by changing the default hunger icons into apple-shaped ones. Also changes food tooltip icons to the appropriate ones.

Only tested on 1.20.1, but should work on any version as long as it's not too old.
